titles.romaji: ONE PIECE: Chinjuu-jima no Chopper Oukoku
titles.english: One Piece: Chopper’s Kingdom on the Island of Strange Animals
titles.native: ONE PIECE 珍獣島のチョッパー王国
synonyms: วันพีซ เดอะมูฟวี่ 3 เกาะแห่งสรรพสัตว์และราชันย์ช็อปเปอร์
Vua Hải Tặc: Vương quốc Chopper trên đảo của những sinh vật lạ
One Piece: Chopper Kingdom of Strange Animal Island
One Piece - Il tesoro del re
titles.tmdb_title: One Piece: Chopper's Kingdom on the Island of Strange Animals

description:
The crew comes upon Crown Island where the animals can talk and they makes Chopper their new king. But there are human hunters there also looking for the legendary horns that will give the person who consumes it immense power. Luffy and friends must stop them from destroying this animal kingdom.

(Source: Anime News Network)
